mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(ll.EVENT_AT, 'HH24') || '시' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.USER_ID) AS value FROM LEARNING_LOG ll JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ll.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ll.COURSE_ID WHERE ll.EVENT_AT >= #{startDate} AND ll.EVENT_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ll.EVENT_AT, 'HH24') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ll.EVENT_AT, 'HH24'))

WITH weekdays AS ( SELECT 0 AS sort_order, '월' AS label FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 1, '화' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 2, '수' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 3, '목' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 4, '금' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 5, '토' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 6, '일' FROM DUAL ), weekday_counts AS ( SELECT TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT) - TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW') AS sort_order, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.USER_ID) AS value FROM LEARNING_LOG ll JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ll.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ll.COURSE_ID WHERE ll.EVENT_AT >= #{startDate} AND ll.EVENT_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT) - TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW') ) SELECT w.label, NVL(wc.value, 0) AS value FROM weekdays w LEFT JOIN weekday_counts wc ON wc.sort_order = w.sort_order ORDER BY w.sort_order

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(week_start, 'MM')) || '/' || TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(week_start, 'W')) || '주' AS label, ROUND(AVG(user_play_seconds) / 3600, 1) AS value FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW') AS week_start, ll.USER_ID, SUM(ll.PLAY_SECONDS) AS user_play_seconds FROM LEARNING_LOG ll JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ll.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ll.COURSE_ID WHERE ll.EVENT_AT >= #{startDate} AND ll.EVENT_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW'), ll.USER_ID ) GROUP BY week_start ORDER BY week_start

SELECT label, NVL(ROUND(participant_count / NULLIF(SUM(participant_count) OVER (), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM ( SELECT NVL(u.KCY_RESULT, '미분류') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID) AS participant_count FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = cls.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY NVL(u.KCY_RESULT, '미분류') ) ORDER BY value DESC, label

SELECT comp.COMPETENCY_NAME AS label, ROUND(AVG(ucs.SCORE), 1) AS value FROM USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs JOIN COMPETENCY comp ON comp.COMPETENCY_ID = ucs.COMPETENCY_ID JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ucs.USER_ID WHERE comp.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY comp.COMPETENCY_NAME ORDER BY comp.COMPETENCY_NAME

WITH periods AS ( SELECT period_start, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN period_start + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN period_start + 7 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 3) END AS period_end, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') || '주' WHEN 'MONTH' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY-MM') ELSE TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY') || ' Q' || TO_CHAR(period_start, 'Q') END AS period_label FROM ( SELECT CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN #{startDate} + LEVEL - 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + ((LEVEL - 1) * 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'), LEVEL - 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q'), (LEVEL - 1) * 3) END AS period_start FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}) + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN CEIL((TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + 1) / 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'MM'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'))) + 1 ELSE FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'Q'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q')) / 3) + 1 END ) WHERE period_start < #{endDate} + 1 ), period_scores AS ( SELECT p.period_start, AVG(csh.SCORE) AS average_score FROM periods p JOIN COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY csh ON csh.CALCULATED_AT >= p.period_start AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < p.period_end JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = csh.USER_ID WHERE csh.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY p.period_start ), baseline_score AS ( SELECT MAX(average_score) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY period_start) AS value FROM period_scores ) SELECT p.period_label AS label, NVL(ROUND( (ps.average_score - bs.value) / NULLIF(bs.value, 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS value FROM periods p LEFT JOIN period_scores ps ON ps.period_start = p.period_start CROSS JOIN baseline_score bs ORDER BY p.period_start
